mapper.select: SELECT mandalart_id, user_id, TO_CHAR(MIN(reg_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reg_date, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN cell_row = '4' AND cell_col = '4' THEN mandalart_content END), '') AS mandalart_title FROM tb_mandalart_node WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reg_date between #{startDate}::date and #{endDate}::date GROUP BY mandalart_id, user_id ORDER BY MIN(reg_date) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mandalart_node ( cell_id, mandalart_id, user_id, reg_date, lvl, cell_row, cell_col, mandalart_content, upd_id, upd_dt, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{cellId}, #{mandalartId}, #{userId}, #{regDate}::date, #{lvl}, #{cellRow}, #{cellCol}, #{mandalartContent}, #{userId}, now(), #{userId}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (mandalart_id, cell_id) DO UPDATE SET mandalart_content = EXCLUDED.mandalart_content, upd_id = EXCLUDED.upd_id, upd_dt = now() ;

INSERT INTO tb_mandalart_node ( cell_id, mandalart_id, user_id, reg_date, lvl, cell_row, cell_col, mandalart_content, upd_id, upd_dt, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{cellId}, #{mandalartId}, #{userId}, #{regDate}::date, #{lvl}, #{cellRow}, #{cellCol}, #{mandalartContent}, #{userId}, now(), #{userId}, now() );
